channel.title: Notifications on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Notifications on Arrans github.io

item.title: binwiederhier/ntfy
item.description: Send push notifications to your phone or desktop using PUT/POST

item.title: dgtlmoon/changedetection.io
item.description: Best and simplest tool for website change detection, web page monitoring, and website change alerts. Perfect for tracking content changes, price drops, restock alerts, and website defacement monitoring—all for free or enjoy our SaaS plan!

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: crazy-max/diun
item.description: Receive notifications when an image is updated on a Docker registry

item.title: containrrr/shoutrrr
item.description: Notification library for gophers and their furry friends.

item.title: dokieli/dokieli
item.description: 💡 dokieli is a clientside editor for decentralised article publishing, annotations and social interactions
